item.title: Buzzy New Releases and More Library Updates
item.description: Buzz worthy new books and a whole host of excellent book news you'll want to know about.

item.title: The Silliest Peanuts Tribute You’ve Never Heard Of
item.description: We love a good Peanuts tribute, and this might be one of the most unexpected and silly.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 19, 2026
item.description: A haunted tram car in an alternate Cairo, the legacy of the Tulsa Race Massacre, secrets and lies at a dating detective agency, and more of today's be...

item.title: DNF Shelves Are Finally Coming to Goodreads
item.description: It only took twenty years, but the social reading platform has decided to make DNFing official.

item.title: The 2025 L.A. Times Book Prizes Finalists and Honorees
item.description: The L.A. Times Book Prize honorees and finalists across 13+ categories have been announced. Check 'em out.
